Product Manager, Growth
at Notion
San Francisco, CA | Remote

About Us
Notion is the connected workspace where better, faster work happens. We're looking for a Product Manager to lead our Growth team and drive user acquisition, activation, and retention strategies.

What You'll Do
- Own the product roadmap for growth initiatives, including onboarding, activation flows, and referral programs
- Analyze user behavior data using SQL, Amplitude, and Mixpanel to identify growth opportunities
- Run A/B experiments to optimize conversion funnels
- Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, data science, and marketing teams
- Present findings and strategy to leadership on a weekly basis
- Define and track key growth metrics (DAU, WAU, activation rate, churn)

Qualifications
- 4+ years of product management experience at a technology company
- Proven track record of driving measurable growth metrics (2x improvement or greater)
- Strong analytical skills — proficiency in SQL is required
- Experience running A/B tests and making data-driven product decisions
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills
- Experience working in SaaS B2B or productivity tools space

Preferred Qualifications
- MBA or equivalent experience
- Experience with product-led growth (PLG) strategies
- Familiarity with experimentation platforms (LaunchDarkly, Optimizely)
- Background in design thinking or user research
- Experience at a high-growth startup (Series B-D)

Our Values
We believe in craftsmanship, transparency, and building tools that empower everyone to create.

Compensation: $160,000 - $220,000 + equity
